body_txt: A child is conceived, but instead of simply mixing one male sperm and one female ovum, as we are used to in case of earthly Eukaryota , a third set of genes becomes involved (or more). Most often used in a Free-Love Future or as a result of Bizarre Alien Biology , a child turns out to be the genetic offspring of multiple people — except, it was natural conception . Perhaps we're dealing with aliens or supernatural beings and it's normal for them to conceive children this way. Or maybe, this was just some freak occurrence which took everybody by surprise. However it went down, there was a mass-coitus and a baby happened. May be related to Polyamory or occur during A Party, Also Known as an Orgy . The situation may conceive An Aesop about such activities. In Real Life (on Earth), eukaryotic organisms tend to have two biological sexes because they're diploidal, that is, have two sets of chromosomes, and the system in which one set comes from each parent is simplest. Besides, eukaryotic organisms also have mitochondria (some have plastids, as well), which, due to their origin as endosymbiotic bacteria, are not created from scratch, but have to be inherited from one parent (and only one - two different lines of mitochondria in one cell is just trouble), which is, again, simplest when one sex always passes the mitochondria to the offspring and one never does. There are other systems, though, but mostly in little known species. Some species have several ecological forms for one sex (often male), though. Compare Bizarre Alien Sexes and Two-Donor Clone . Compare and contrast Homosexual Reproduction . Inverse Trope to Truly Single Parent . Some variants of Hypothetical Offspring Comparison might involve this.
